JSON files listing Unicode codepoints and licenses for Sazanami Mincho and M+ Bitmap Fonts.


## Files
- **[codepoints_including_chinese_pair_chars_and_right_signle_quote.json](codepoints_including_chinese_pair_chars_and_right_signle_quote.json.md)**: A JSON file listing Unicode codepoints, including Chinese characters and a right single quote.
- **[codepoints_including_right_single_quote.json](codepoints_including_right_single_quote.json.md)**: A JSON file listing Unicode code points, including the right single quotation mark.
- **[LICENSE.sazanami-mincho](LICENSE.sazanami-mincho.md)**: License information for Sazanami Mincho font, declaring it as Public Domain with no warranty.
- **[LICENSE_J.sazanami-mincho](LICENSE_J.sazanami-mincho.md)**: License for M+ Bitmap Fonts allowing free use, modification, and distribution without warranty.
